records.m_Talk_ENG: There are still many people who remain missing in the Corrupted Areas. They'll probably die there if I don't save them. Looks like it's going to be another busy day tomorrow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My wife paid me a visit. As much as I tried to stay out of my family's way, I guess one of the guys with loose lips told her my address.
